Why this matters
operationally

elements.text: FlowRadar is what turns a governance dashboard into an operations platform. It shows where government objects are stuck, which department owns the bottleneck, and what the next intervention should be.
elements.textPreview: FlowRadar is what turns a governance dashboard into an operations platform. It shows where government objects are stuck, which department...

are stuck, which department owns the bottleneck, and what the next intervention should be.

elements.text: Instead of asking “what was announced?” the user can ask “what is moving, what is blocked, and what has actually arrived?”
